current.label: Critical alignment

frameworks.name: Barbault
frameworks.status: Rising from 2020 minimum — index ~600, dispersal phase
frameworks.detail: Post-trough recovery. Saturn-Neptune conjunction (2026) is the defining event. Index projected to peak ~750 by 2028.

frameworks.name: Turchin SDT
frameworks.status: PSI at 0.87 — highest recorded level for US
frameworks.detail: All three components (MMP, EMP, SFD) elevated simultaneously. Historical precedent: 1850s (pre-Civil War) and 1920s (pre-Depression).

frameworks.name: Kondratieff
frameworks.status: Late Winter of 5th wave / 6th wave installation
frameworks.detail: Perez 'Turning Point' — between Installation frenzy and potential Deployment golden age. Requires institutional recomposition.

frameworks.name: Strauss-Howe
frameworks.detail: Projected crisis climax 2025-2030. Generational archetype alignment: Boomers as elder Prophets, Millennials as young-adult Heroes.

frameworks.name: Dalio
frameworks.detail: US debt/GDP 123%, internal political dysfunction, China's power index converging. Reserve currency status under pressure but not yet threatened.

current.synthesis: All five frameworks independently indicate the 2020s as a period of systemic transition. The convergence is remarkable because these frameworks were developed in different centuries, by different civilizations, using different methodologies. Whether this reflects genuine macro-cyclical patterns or confirmation bias in pattern-matching primates remains an open question — which is itself the most interesting question.

historicalConvergences.outcome: Destruction of 4 empires (Ottoman, Austro-Hungarian, Russian, German). Redrew world map.
New world order: UN, Bretton Woods, US hegemony, nuclear age.
Neoliberal revolution (Reagan/Thatcher). Set stage for Soviet collapse.
Ongoing. Pandemic, supply chain restructuring, AI emergence, geopolitical realignment.

caveat: Convergence scoring is inherently subjective. These frameworks were not designed to interoperate. Their apparent agreement may reflect: (1) genuine macro-cyclical patterns in complex systems, (2) the tendency of ~50-year cycles to occasionally synchronize, (3) retrospective fitting bias, or (4) the human capacity to find patterns in noise. AkhAI presents all four possibilities honestly.
